ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trade_data" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade entry */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade transaction */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trade transaction */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the trade transaction */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the trade transaction */,
  "commodity_code" TEXT /* Unique code representing the traded commodity */,
  "raw_date" TEXT /* Full timestamp of the trade entry */,
  "value_usd" REAL /* Monetary value of the trade in US dollars */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (export/import) */,
  "port_of_arrival" TEXT /* Port of arrival for the traded goods */,
  "port_of_departure" TEXT /* Port of departure for the traded goods */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_port_of_arrival FOREIGN KEY ("port_of_arrival") REFERENCES ports ("port_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_commodity_code FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_code") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_port_of_departure FOREIGN KEY ("port_of_departure") REFERENCES ports ("port_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_month FOREIGN KEY ("month") REFERENCES months ("month"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "commodity_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the commodity */,
  "commodity_name" TEXT /* Name of the commodity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the commodity */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the commodity */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the commodity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trade data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the trade data */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Full name of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "trader_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the trader */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the trader */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the trader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trader_trade_relation" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader trade relationship */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade transaction */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader associated with the trade */,
  "trade_role" TEXT /* Role of the trader in the trade (buyer/seller) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trader_trade_relation_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trade_data ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trader_trade_relation_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the port is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical trade entry */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade transaction */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the historical trade entry */,
  "value_usd" REAL /* Monetary value of the historical trade in US dollars */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the historical trade entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_historical_data_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trade_data ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each trade entry
Unique code representing the traded commodity
Full timestamp of the trade entry
Monetary value of the trade in US dollars
Port of arrival for the traded goods
Port of departure for the traded goods
Unique identifier for each trader trade relationship
ID of the trader associated with the trade
Role of the trader in the trade (buyer/seller)
Country where the port is located
Unique identifier for each historical trade entry
Date of the historical trade entry
Monetary value of the historical trade in US dollars
Notes about the historical trade entry
Unique identifier for each user role
Permissions associated with the user role
